query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.slug, c.name as categoryName, s.hasBobaOption, s.hasSizeVariants 
FROM subcategories s 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
ORDER BY c.name, s.name;
command:

FROM subcategories s 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
ORDER BY c.name, s.name;
